records.ety: [OE. brothel, brodel, brethel, a prostitute, a worthless fellow, fr. AS. berðan to ruin, destroy; cf. AS. bretan to break, and E. brittle. The term brothel house was confused with bordel brothel. CF. Bordel.]

defs: A house of lewdness or ill fame; a house frequented by prostitutes; a bawdyhouse.
